title: Synchrony's CareCredit Now Offered at More Than 95% of Veterinary University Hospitals Nationwide
text: Virginia Tech, University of Missouri and Oregon State University Latest to Select CareCredit as Financing Solution of Choice for Pet Care CareCredit Accepted by 28 of the Nation's 29 Public Veterinary University Hospitals for General Practice, Specialty and Emergency Care STAMFORD, Conn. , Sept. 13, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Synchrony (NYSE: SYF), a leading consumer finance company, today announced partnerships with Virginia Tech, the University of Missouri and Oregon State University, making the company's CareCredit health and wellness credit card a financing option for the schools' veterinary university hospitals.
